## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between Haley Draznin's podcast production company and GrowthX for audience growth and content repurposing.](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX specializes in creating content engines, focusing on editorial and programmatic content for websites](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Their services start at $9,000/month for 5-8 articles/week, with 12-month minimum engagements](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [While not directly focused on podcast growth, GrowthX can repurpose podcast content into SEO-optimized articles (e.g., Galileo AI case study)](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Potential for partnership in referring clients, but white-labeling isn't currently offered](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)

## Topics

### Haley's Podcast Production Company

  - [Works with clients to build YouTube presence and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [Focuses on growing podcast downloads and video podcast viewership](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Uses social media for tremendous growth in podcast downloads](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Interested in utilizing AI software for content distribution and growth](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)

### GrowthX's Core Offerings

  - [Creates content engines for customers, starting with editorial or programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Focuses on website content, not specifically driving podcast downloads](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Can customize workflows but maintains focus on core competencies](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Helps clients become publishers through their own networks (website, social)](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [Uses AI automation to break down content creation into efficient workflows](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)

### Content Repurposing for Podcasts

  - [Example: Galileo AI podcast repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
      - [Creates articles from podcast transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Embeds video content](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
      - [Extracts quotes and attributes speakers](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
      - [Aims for SEO value and extended distribution](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Technology

  - [Breaks down content creation into specific workflows](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [Built proprietary platform to handle complex parallel processing](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
  - [Reduces content creation time from hours to minutes](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Incorporates human expertise at key points in the process](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)

### Potential Partnership and Pricing

  - [Base engagement: $9,000/month for 5-8 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [12-month minimum commitment](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
  - [Open to exploring partnership opportunities for mutual client referrals](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [Not currently set up for white-labeling services](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)

## Next Steps

  - Haley to consider potential clients that might benefit from GrowthX services
  - [GrowthX to potentially prepare a shareable deck of services/packages for Haley](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [Haley to share details of interested clients for qualification](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Potential follow-up call to discuss specific client opportunities and partnership structure](https://fathom.video/share/ouU6GVirU6TkZsHCYBv7a_QzakTj-iUS?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
